# CMakeLists.txt for flatbuffers (source build)
# This file is a placeholder.
# Flatbuffers has its own CMake build system. This file is not directly used for compilation
# if WazuhExternalDependencies.cmake uses add_subdirectory() on its source directory.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22.1)
project(wazuh_ext_flatbuffers NONE)

message(STATUS "This CMakeLists.txt (src/engine/external/flatbuffers/CMakeLists.txt) is a placeholder. Flatbuffers' own CMake script is used directly.")
